notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate, close to the hire-ready threshold. Names the three-audience framing and the misfit. Proposes a specific headline sentence and identifies the buried-lede failure. Catches three of four voice failures (euphemism, false precision, generic risk) with specific rewrites — partial credit on color washing because it's implicit in the RAG critique rather than named as a voice failure separately. Audits every workstream RAG against operational evidence with specific re-ratings. Names the amber-conversation move with PM. Workflow proposal is specific and chapter-aligned with the Monday-template / Thursday-send rhythm. Not yet hire-ready because: (a) the audience packaging move is named but not designed — does not propose what the COO version specifically contains, (b) the RAG conversation is framed competently but does not address the chapter's broader 'twelve weeks of green is a reported-not-real project' framing as a pattern S. should reflect on.
